question: Trump out as President before 2027?
narrative_context: Trump age 79, actively governing Operation Epic Fury (Iran military conflict)
Republican Senate controls 52 seats; impeachment conviction needs 67 votes (2/3 majority)
Democratic leadership explicitly NOT discussing impeachment: Pete Aguilar (House Dem Caucus chair) March 2026 'no Democrats talking about this'
Prediction markets show 11% on Trump impeachment by end of 2026, 72% by end of term (2029)
25th Amendment removal requires VP + Cabinet majority; Trump's cabinet filled with loyalists
Trump health: no credible incapacity reports; actively campaigning and governing
evidence: CNN, January 2026: Democratic leaders view impeachment as 'politically risky' and 'doomed in Senate'
House Dem Caucus (Pete Aguilar), March 2026: 'literally no Democrats are talking about this'
Congress.gov: H.Res. impeachment resolutions introduced but no serious movement, dead on arrival in GOP House
IBA analysis: 25th Amendment removal 'exceedingly unlikely' without true incapacity; Trump cabinet is loyalist
counter_evidence: Black swan health event (major stroke, cardiac event) or sudden scandal could change calculus. Trump is 79; baseline mortality risk nonzero. But markets overestimate these tails.
thesis: Market overprices Trump removal at 17.5%. Three paths to removal: (1) Impeachment — requires 67 Senate votes; GOP controls 52 and opposes, Dems not even discussing it. (2) 25th Amendment — requires VP + Cabinet majority; cabinet is loyalist, Trump not incapacitated. (3) Death/incapacity — Trump 79 but no health indicators; medical base rate for in-office presidential death ~0% in modern era (0 of 19 post-1950 presidents died in office). Trump actively governing largest military operation since Iraq (Operation Epic Fury). Conviction path politically impossible. Real probability: 2%.
x_thread: Market says Trump leaves office before Jan 1, 2027. 17.5% odds. But conviction requires 67 Senate votes. GOP controls 52. Do the math. 🧵
Impeachment path: Dead on arrival. Dem leadership (March '26): 'Literally no Democrats are talking about this.' It's politically exhausted.
25th Amendment path: Cabinet is filled with loyalists. Trump actively governing largest military op since Iraq. Not incapacitated. Removal = 0%.
Black swan (stroke, cardiac event) prices in real tail risk. But base rate in modern presidency: 0 in-office deaths since 1950. Real odds: ~2%. https://dub.sh/pb-x
